mapper.select:
select E.EVALUATION_NO ,ES.SCORE ,ES.RESON ,EI.ITEM_NO ,EI.FIELD ,ED.MEMO ,FI.FILE_NO ,FI.FILE_SIZE ,FI.ORIGINAL_NAME from EVALUATION_SCORE ES inner join EVALUATION_ITEM EI on (EI.ITEM_NO = ES.ITEM_NO) inner join EVALUATION E on (E.EVALUATION_NO = ES.EVALUATION_NO) inner join EVALUATION_HISTORY EH on (EH.EVALUATION_NO = E.EVALUATION_NO and EH.HISTORY_NO = ( select nvl(max(EH2.HISTORY_NO), 0) from EVALUATION_HISTORY EH2 where EH2.EVALUATION_NO = E.EVALUATION_NO )) left join EVALUATION_DOC ED on (ED.HISTORY_NO = EH.HISTORY_NO) left join FILE_INFO FI on (FI.FILE_NO = ED.FILE_NO)
inner join COMPANY C on (C.COMPANY_NO = E.EVALUATION_NO)
where E.EVALUATION_NO = #{companyNo}
and C.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
order by EI.ITEM_NO asc
mapper.insert: insert into EVALUATION_HISTORY(EVALUATION_NO, EVALUATE_BY, REVISION_NO, ACTION_RESON) values (#{evaluationNo}, #{actionBy}, #{revisionNo}, #{actionReson})
mapper.select:
select EH.REVISION_NO ,EH.UPDATE_AT ,EH.ACTION_RESON ,M.NICKNAME from EVALUATION_HISTORY EH left join MEMBER M on (M.MEMBER_NO = EH.EVALUATE_BY)
left join EVALUATION E on (E.EVALUATION_NO = EH.EVALUATION_NO) left join COMPANY C on (C.COMPANY_NO = E.EVALUATION_NO)
where EH.EVALUATION_NO = #{evaluationNo} and EH.REVISION_NO between #{startRow} and #{endRow}
and C.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
order by EH.REVISION_NO DESC

select count(*) from EVALUATION_HISTORY EH
left join EVALUATION E on (E.EVALUATION_NO = EH.EVALUATION_NO) left join COMPANY C on (C.COMPANY_NO = E.EVALUATION_NO)
where EH.EVALUATION_NO = #{evaluationNo}
and C.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
select EI.ITEM_NO ,EI.FIELD ,ES.SCORE ,ES.RESON from EVALUATION_SCORE ES inner join EVALUATION_ITEM EI on (ES.ITEM_NO = EI.ITEM_NO) where ES.EVALUATION_NO = #{evaluationNo}
